downstream_usage: ComfyUI character identity and wardrobe reference
Northern Frosthoof deer noble shaman visual lock
costume and prop handoff for rare fur cape, ice-blue woven inner layer, bone flute, snow herb pouch, jade clasps, aurora-green beads, and small ice-blue survival fire

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
The Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem is locked; do not create a new deer clan crest, personal Lu Mi logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, or modern mark.
Use the existing Wanshou system only as material and object-symbol language: bonewood knots, antler-branch lines, rawhide cord, wind-worn bone, oath cord, and small ice-blue fire points.
Lu Mi must read as a beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman around 20, not a child, not a generic human in antler accessories, and not a full animal creature.

Preserve clear soft deer ears, short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments, pale clear eyes, long neck and shoulder line, noble restraint, rare white fur layers, ice-blue inner garment, bone-white robe or skirt, bone flute, and snow herb pouch.
Costume can be wind-worn and snow-dusted but must stay refined, complete, noble, and functional.
Low magic is limited to small ice-blue survival/shaman fire and reflected light on ritual objects; no attack magic, large aura, or spell circle.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
